revised_prompt: Photorealistic editorial fashion shot of a deconstructed avant-garde gown displayed against a neutral grey studio background. The garment is an upcycled masterpiece featuring a structured bodice made from a charcoal-to-cyan gradient sweatshirt with exposed, raw-edge seams. Exaggerated, architectural shoulders are crafted from crisp white embroidered cotton, transitioning into voluminous, floor-length asymmetrical draping. Layers of tattered, sheer pink and black floral tie-dye chiffon cascade from the waist and sleeves, creating a dark romantic silhouette. Dramatic chiaroscuro lighting emphasizes the high-contrast textures of heavy jersey, delicate eyelet embroidery, and ethereal silk. Sharp focus on intricate stitching and clashing fabric patterns, 8k resolution, cinematic runway aesthetic.
